---
title: "Miss Seymour"
---

## Miss Seymour

### Description

telling CMY Edith Jacob absent in 1871

### Biography

She was probably Edith’s first cousin, daughter of Rev. George Augustus Seymour (1828/9-1909), Rector of Holy Trinity, Winchester, and Elizabeth (Noel) Seymour (d. 1868).

### Letters

- Letter from May 20th [1871?[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
